languages.text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн ворчит:{/n} "Я готов на это грубое нарушение привилегии приватности, если это позволит обличить ложь генетора Ферренца. Доступ к логам санкционирован".

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."
languages.original_text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн ворчит:{/n} "Я готов на это грубое нарушение привилегии приватности, если это позволит обличить ложь генетора Ферренца. Доступ к логам санкционирован".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

languages.text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn gruñe:{/n} «Estoy dispuesto a sufrir esta indigna vulneración de mi privacidad si con ello puedo exponer las mentiras del genetor Ferrenz. Acceso concedido a los registros».
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn gruñe:{/n} «Estoy dispuesto a sufrir esta indigna vulneración de mi privacidad si con ello puedo exponer las mentiras del genetor Ferrenz. Acceso concedido a los registros».

languages.text: {n}迟疑片刻后，伊奥贡嘟囔道：{/n}“只要能揭穿基因士费伦茨的谎言，我愿意忍受这种对隐私的严重侵犯。日志访问权限已授予。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}迟疑片刻后，伊奥贡嘟囔道：{/n}“只要能揭穿基因士费伦茨的谎言，我愿意忍受这种对隐私的严重侵犯。日志访问权限已授予。”

languages.text: {n}Après un moment d'hésitation, Eogunn marmonne :{/n} « Je me soumets à cette flagrante atteinte à ma vie privée si cela me permet de révéler les mensonges du genetor Ferrenz. Accès aux journaux accordé. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après un moment d'hésitation, Eogunn marmonne :{/n} « Je me soumets à cette flagrante atteinte à ma vie privée si cela me permet de révéler les mensonges du genetor Ferrenz. Accès aux journaux accordé. »

languages.text: {n}Bir anlık tereddüdün ardından Eogunn homurdanıyor.{/n} "Genetör Ferrenz'in yalanlarını ortaya çıkarmamı sağlayacaksa bu büyük gizlilik ihlaline katlanmaya razıyım. Kayıtlara erişim izni verildi."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir anlık tereddüdün ardından Eogunn homurdanıyor.{/n} "Genetör Ferrenz'in yalanlarını ortaya çıkarmamı sağlayacaksa bu büyük gizlilik ihlaline katlanmaya razıyım. Kayıtlara erişim izni verildi."

languages.text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern murmelt Eogunn: {/n} "Ich bin bereit, diese unerhörte Störung der Privatsphäre zu erdulden, wenn ich dadurch die Lügen von Genetor Ferrenz aufdecken kann. Zugang zu den Protokollen gewährt."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern murmelt Eogunn: {/n} "Ich bin bereit, diese unerhörte Störung der Privatsphäre zu erdulden, wenn ich dadurch die Lügen von Genetor Ferrenz aufdecken kann. Zugang zu den Protokollen gewährt."

languages.text: {n}しばし逡巡したのち、エオガンは不機嫌そうにこぼす。{/n}「ジェネター・フェレンツの嘘を暴けるのであれば、このプライバシーの甚だしい侵害も甘んじて受けよう。ログへのアクセスを許可する。」
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy if it will allow me to expose Genetor Ferrenz's lies. Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}しばし逡巡したのち、エオガンは不機嫌そうにこぼす。{/n}「ジェネター・フェレンツの嘘を暴けるのであれば、このプライバシーの甚だしい侵害も甘んじて受けよう。ログへのアクセスを許可する。」
